---
title: "adsdasdasdasdasd"
author: "Fernando Ponce"
date: "2026-04-23"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```


```{r}

#BASE DA DATOS 
library(openxlsx)
datos<-read.xlsx(file.choose(), sheet="aeusp")

#Temposp
Temposp = datos[,7]
Temposp

```



```{r}

library(psych)
describe(Temposp)

# Diagrama de caja
boxplot(Temposp,
        horizontal = TRUE,
        col = "green",
        border = "black",
        main = "Tiempo de residencia en São Paulo, en años.",
        xlab = "Número de años")
```
